title: Full Stack Developer & AI-Augmented Solutions Architect with 15+ years building scalable backends, modernizing legacy systems and accelerating delivery across Latin America.
description: From CTO & Co-Founder to Full Stack Developer & Solutions Architect (also leading DevOps) at high-growth startups operating across Colombia, Mexico and Brazil. Currently leading the renewal of a B2B e-commerce platform — decomposing legacy monoliths into clean Go microservices. I design and build the systems end-to-end, lead monolith-to-microservices migrations and leverage AI-Assisted Development (Claude Code, Cursor) to multiply team velocity on critical Backend and Cloud deliverables without sacrificing stability or quality.
